status: real TESS injection/recovery calibration; not a discovery search
interpretation: This engineering grid is saturated on the selected bright-star backgrounds; the next calibration must move to shallower depths.
caveats: The selected stars are screening backgrounds, not certified signal-free controls.
Dimming and brightening pre-injection events remain unclassified until astrophysical vetting.
Perfect recovery at 0.4%-0.8% does not imply sensitivity to Earth-size transits.
